summary: The ECIES algorithm divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in existing crypto error returns; no encryption, parsing, MAC, or bounds-check behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 140: M	crates/net/ecies/src/algorithm.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to existing OutOfBounds, EncryptedDataTooSmall, tag-check, InvalidHeader, and body MAC error returns.
No split bounds, encrypted-message parsing, public-key/header/body layout, MAC digest comparison, AES keystream application, or body length behavior changed.
